title: Cloud Kinematics Velocimetry
definition: The concept of extracting cloud speed and direction by analyzing the geometry, terminal velocity, and slant angle of raindrops.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The concept of extracting cloud speed and direction by analyzing the geometry, terminal velocity, and slant angle of raindrops.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The concept of extracting cloud speed and direction by analyzing the geometry, terminal velocity, and slant angle of raindrops.
difficulty_levels.expert: Even slight deviations from vertical in raindrop fall can be used to calculate cloud speed.

extra_fields.insight: Even slight deviations from vertical in raindrop fall can be used to calculate cloud speed.
